NCT05096221.label: Outcome
NCT05096221.text: Ambulatory males with DMD, ≥4 years to <8 years of age, were randomized and stratified by age group and North Star Ambulatory Assessment (NSAA) score to single-administration intravenous delandistrogene moxeparvovec (1.33 × 1014 vector genomes per kilogram; n = 63) or placebo (n = 62).

NCT03769116.label: Outcome
NCT03769116.text: Physicians in the higher clinical workload group had a mean (SD) of 818.8 (429.1) patient encounters, 11.6 (4.7) patient appointments per day, and 4.0 (1.1) days per week in clinic.

NCT03825555.label: Outcome
NCT03825555.source: Frontiers in cell and developmental biology
NCT03825555.text: Patients were randomized and stratified by age to placebo (n = 21) or delandistrogene moxeparvovec (n = 20) and crossed over for Part 2.

NCT01396239.label: Outcome
NCT01396239.text: We have rebuilt the SNV collection based on GENCODE 9 and currently the database includes 87,347,043 nsSNVs and 2,270,742 essential splice site SNVs (an 18% increase compared to dbNSFP v1.0).

NCT02500381.label: Outcome
NCT02500381.text: During dose titration, participants were randomized 2:1 to weekly casimersen infusions at escalating doses of 4, 10, 20, and 30 mg/kg (≥2 weeks per dose), or placebo.

NCT02851797.label: Outcome
NCT02851797.text: Boys were divided into two groups on the basis of their baseline vastus lateralis fat fraction (VLFF; measured by magnetic resonance spectroscopy): group A comprised boys with a VLFF of more than 5% but no more than 30%, whereas group B comprised boys with a VLFF of 5% or less, or more than 30%.

NCT04281485.label: Outcome
NCT04281485.text: METHODS: CIFFREO was a phase 3, double-blind, randomised, placebo-controlled study done at 45 academic and hospital sites in Australia, Belgium, Canada, France, Germany, Israel, Italy, Japan, Russia, South Korea, Spain, Switzerland, Taiwan, the UK, and the USA.
